entry.title: Re: Where can i information on disaster recovery and high...
Re: Where can i information on disaster recovery and high...
entry.content: Hi jayantvikram, What I can share with you is note 3396152 - FAQs about backup and recovery service for S/4HANA Public Cloud Customers https://me.sap.com/notes/3396152/E where you can find fundamental information. And there is a PDF attached in the note showing DISASTER RECOVERY details. Furthermore I would recommend that a service incident should be created in case you need additional queries. Br,Bob

entry.title: Re: How an issue in Calendar ui.integration.cards turned out to be a feature. Kind of
entry.content:
Hi Alex, 

Nice article, definitely encouraging. In the UI integration card, if the non-working days have to be changed to Friday & Thursday is there any configuration to be in place?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: RV开票转账的时候，发出商品科目怎么可以对应到客户
entry.content:
Hi , 首先为什么需要使用发出商品的解决方案？是不是需要保证成本和收入配比，如果是，其实不需要使用发出商品的方案。

假设你现在使用的是S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,现在使用scope item5MQ可以实现不用发出商品方案，保证成本和收入配比，而且在成本还原时差异自动结转，客户信息也会记录在凭证流里。可以参见博客里的‘’实际成本-发出商品差异结转‘’部分的信息。

Br,Bob

entry.title: While creating PR -ME51N getting Error Virus Scan Profile is not active
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is an error coming while manual creation of PR in ME51N.

when user enters all the line items details manually .and when user enters Purchase Org and Acct assignment data , and press Enter , Warning is coming "Virus Scan Profile /SOAP_CORE/WS_RECEIVE is not active".

and it is suppressing error messages coming from ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM. and this is happening only when we enter Purch Org Data.

Can anyone help on this?

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: How to copy data automatically when work status changes to approved?
entry.content:
I have setup work status dimensions like Project, Project Type, Version, Scenario, Calculation. I want when I change the status to approved, I will consider the latest approval value of the data of the dimensions that will be copied into the final scenario.

Project: 1000 to 1000
Project Type: PL to PL
Version: V1 to V1
Calculation : SC to SC
Scenario : S001 to Final

Please help me.

Thank yo

work status, script logic, data manager,

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2405 版本的亮点新功能：(A)VC之上的产品配置规则
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我们会讨论SAP CPQ 2405 的一项新功能：在SAP ERP (A)VC的场景下，在SAP CPQ 内部添加产品配置规则。首先，让我们简明扼要地了解一下使用到的术语。

术语缩写定义

SAP CPQ

"SAP Configure Price Quote"，是SAP ERP云产品系列中的一款专注可配置解决方案的销售报价工具云服务，其既可独立于其它SAP家族产品运作，亦可结合SAP Cloud Integration、SAP Master Data Integration、SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing、SAP Subscription Billing等服务与SAP S/4HANA（包括云与本地部署版本）高度集成。

SAP VCP

"SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing"，亦有简称"CPS"，是SAP业务技术云平台（Business Technology Platform，aka BTP）上的一个微服务，与SAP ERP（包括部分ECC版本、及所有S/4HANA云及本地部署版本）高度集成，面向前端应用平台提供开箱即用的云服务接口，消费SAP ERP (A)VC及销售定价的功能。

SAP (A)VC

"SAP (Advanced) Variant Configuration"，即“SAP变式配置”或“SAP高级变式配置”。

 

新功能简介

在千呼万唤中，SAP CPQ 2405正式官宣支持集成SAP ERP (A)VC的场景下，于CPQ内对集成同步的(A)VC产品补充产品配置规则。此前SAP CPQ已全面支持于CPQ内创建营销/销售BoM，组合来自SAP ERP的简单产品、(A)VC产品，以及CPQ内的简单产品和可配置产品，从而支持了深度使用SAP ERP (A)VC的企业拆分管理产研BoM与营销/销售BoM，既高度耦合，又相对独立。本次更新后，此种管理模式将得到系统工具层面的进一步升华，企业营销/销售部门可在SAP CPQ内通过简单易用的功能对(A)VC产品构建销售策略指导下的配置规则，这些规则基于ERP中(A)VC的底座，又能在不影响产研的情况下，丰富营销的规则。
新功能同时适用 Quote 1.0 和 Quote 2.0 引擎版本，具体如下。

 

新功能详解

IronPython 脚本方式

基于 OnProductReady 脚本事件

可在用户打开产品配置器时，执行一次性的初始化配置逻辑，应用场景包括但不限于按业务规则做初始选配。

低代码公式（Formula）方式

可见性限制（Visibility Restrictions）

支持对每次VCP配置接口交互后，进一步隐藏部分属性或属性值。其中规则条件支持公式标签动态获取变量，动作结果目前仅支持建模师手动选择指定的属性或属性名。

产品配置消息（Product Messages）

支持在VCP配置接口交互及CPQ配置引擎流程的终点，显示一条产品配置消息，并在满足规则条件的情况下，将产品配置标识为不完整（Incomplete）。消息内容中若强行植入产品配置操作标签，系统将跳过这些标签的解析。

 

效果示例

在CPQ管理员Setup界面中，打开目标(A)VC产品的某一KB对应的产品版本详情页面，在Definition页签可看到Configuration Type为"Variant"。通过此选项，CPQ将在用户于配置器中操作时，与SAP VCP服务进行集成交互，获得产品的配置规则校验结果，并呈现于CPQ配置器UI。

当产品的Configuration Type为"Variant"时，页签Rules and Messages中将仅剩"Visibility Restrictions"和"Product Messages"两类产品规则，页签Scripts中挂靠的脚本也仅剩"When product is ready"事件可供选择。

"Product Messages"和产品事件脚本的建模操作与非(A)VC产品无异。"Visibility Restrictions"为本次更新的全新建模子功能。点击"Add Restrictions"后，产品建模师可在画面中维护限制规则的名称、描述、执行顺序、规则条件、操作对象类型、及限制对象值。其中规则条件支持使用公式标签处理动态的变量取值与逻辑运算，操作对象类型支持属性或属性值，限制对象值支持多值选择。

当销售用户在产品配置器页面操作时，上述规则将被实时解析执行。打开Developer Console，可观察到系统执行规则解析与校验的顺序为：VCP配置接口集成交互->VCP价格接口集成交互->基于VCP配置接口结果调整CPQ配置结果->执行CPQ的配置规则。

 

展望

在SAP ERP (A)VC集成的场景下，SAP CPQ用户一直希望在系统内创建与营销和销售相关的产品信息。随着SAP CPQ 2405版本的发布，这个诉求已经得到了支持，预计相关功能会在以后得到进一步的完善和优化。
如果您有更好的想法或需求，我们欢迎您使用公司的SAP统一账号在SAP CPQ (Configure Price Quote) - Customer Influence (sap.com)提出您的建议。同时，您还可以查看其他SAP CPQ用户的想法，通过投票支持他们，甚至与他们或SAP CPQ的产品经理进行交流。

entry.title: Requirement to use signature algorithm XAdES-T
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to sign an XML file using XAdES-T (XML Advanced Electronic Signature with Time-Stamp) in ABAP as I found, sap doesn't support XAdES-T.  If can, kindly help on how to do this, since this is my first time to do digital signature. Kindly advise.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: User Account Control
entry.content:
As @SonTran has mentioned, if you turned UAC completely off this prompt would definitely go away.  So likely you have not done this properly or there is some group policy higher level that is keeping it on.

  1. Click "Start"
  2. Start typing "Control Panel" and click it
  3. Click "User Accounts
  4. Click "Change User Account Control settings"
  5. Drop the bar down to "Never notify"
  6. Click "OK"
  7. Restart your workstation

If this does not stick then you need higher level permissions or you need for your user to be setup as "Local Administrator".

To set your user as a local admin here are some steps:

https://docs.rackspace.com/docs/add-a-user-to-the-local-administrators-group-in-windows-server-2012

If neither of these work you could let SAP run as a user and not as an administrator.

  1. Click "Start"
  2. Type "SAP Business One" to bring up the icon
  3. Right-click the start menu icon and select "Open file location"
  4. Find the shortcut and right-click >> Properties
  5. Under the "Compatibility" tab make sure you uncheck the "Run as administrator" checkbox
  6. Click "OK"

If none of this works it's still UAC but you just need an IT person to help you with the user profile.  That message is 100% related to UAC settings whether they are local to the user or inherited by the domain.

Good luck!

entry.title: Grass Referral Code: dxxPHABope2TOf4

entry.title: Prtial payment
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

While doing partial payment in F-53 my payment terms are changing.

for example- while doing payment in F-53 the payment term in the document is 006 however after doing the payment the payment term is showing 004.

 

please advise.

entry.title: Re: Prtial payment
entry.content:
Hi @AK6 

Please check the tolerance group assigned to vendor/customer and check the configuration of the tolerance group in T Code OBA3. If you are creating residual items through manual clearing, it is possible, that the payment term is copied from what has been set up in the tolerance group.

If this is not the case, than the partial payment may pick up the default payment term assigned in the customer/vendor master in case of partial payment

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: crystal report output is coming differently from SAPB...
entry.content:
Same rpt is coming with different data from different RDB client system.

For example from my RDB client system qty is coming 14 but from another RDB client  system in the same rpt output qty is 27 and alignment also coming wrong.

entry.title: Re: Get to know what’s new for SAP SuccessFactors Learning with 1H2024 release
entry.content:
Hi, I refer to the Important Learning section and the comment "If allowed by the administrator, they can easily remove these assignments from their list, for example if they find that these are not currently relevant for them due to a change in their role, or because they already took a very similar training recently."

I am wondering if there's a way to toggle the ability for users to remove optional assignments to all items? With this update, this section will be very clogged for users as we have hundreds of items so there may be many they have not attended and now can't remove and clean up the important learning section due to this addition.  At the moment we would have to go in to each item and change the toggle which is not really possible.

Alternatively, other way is to have seperate subledger accounts for Materials and Services, even though the party is the same.

entry.title: How to call Hana stored procedure from cap java
entry.content:
I am new to cap java. I have built a cap java application, by referring to available samples and documentation.

I want to know how to call Hana stored procedure from cap java. The documentation for the same is available in cap nodejs but not for java.

Any help is appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines
entry.content:
Oh baby baby this is right in my wheelhouse.  A B1UP grid loop of an SQL Report UF??

I have done something very similar, not identical but my code will hopefully give you a couple of good ideas on how to troubleshoot your UF.

The point of my code is to create a "bill of lading" document by linking several sales orders through the "Referenced Document" system.  Then I use this to do a grouped printout later in Crystal.

I run the first part off of a Sales Order from a function button into an SQL Report Universal Function like this (pretty standard HANA SQL):

SELECT
     'N' AS "Link"
    ,T0."DocEntry"
    ,$[ORDR.DocEntry] AS "BaseDocEntry"
    ,CASE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RDR21 S0 WHERE S0."DocEntry" = $[ORDR.DocEntry]) WHEN 0 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS "FirstRow"
    ,T0."DocNum"
    ,CASE T0."DocStatus" WHEN 'O' THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END AS "Status"
    ,T0."NumAtCard"
    ,T0."DocDate"
    ,T0."DocDueDate"
    ,CASE WHEN T1."DocEntry" IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "Linked"
    ,T0."ShipToCode"
    ,T0."Address2"
    ,X."ItemCode"
    ,X."ItemName"
    ,X."Quantity"

FROM
    ORDR T0
    LEFT JOIN RDR21 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."RefDocEntr" AND T1."DocEntry" = $[ORDR.DocEntry] AND T0."ObjType" = T1."ObjectType" AND T0."ObjType" = T1."RefObjType" AND T1."Remark" = 'Shipping Link'

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
             D0."DocEntry"
            ,D0."ItemCode"
            ,D0."Dscription" AS "ItemName"
            ,D0."Quantity"
       FROM RDR1 D0
       WHERE D0."VisOrder" = 0
    ) X ON T0."DocEntry" = X."DocEntry"

WHERE 
    T0."CardCode" = $[$4.0.0]
    AND
    T0."ShipToCode" = $[$40.0.0]
    AND
    T0."DocNum" > $[$8.0.0]
    AND
    (T0."DocStatus" = 'O' OR T1."DocEntry" IS NOT NULL)

ORDER BY T0."DocNum"

The code indicates other sales orders going to the same address and shows if they are already linked through the "Referenced Document" system or not.

Then there is a checkbox in the first column which I use as an indicator for the Dynamic Syntax to pick up later.

I used the Item Placement Tool to make a button called "Link Shipments" and then a B1 Validation to run this dynamic syntax which loops the SQL Report grid, looks for shipments that have a checkbox and that are not already linked (this is C#):

// Variables
string docLink,isLinked,DocEntry,DocNum,BaseDocEntry,cMessErr;
int nResult;
bool FirstRow;

// Assuming you have a grid object named "oGrid" in your SAP Business One form
Grid oGrid = (Grid)application.Forms.ActiveForm.Items.Item("BOY_1").Specific;

// Get the number of rows in the grid
int rowCount = oGrid.Rows.Count;

BaseDocEntry = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("BaseDocEntry", 0).ToString();
FirstRow = Convert.ToBoolean(oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("FirstRow", 0).ToString());
SAPbobsCOM.Documents oOrder = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oOrders);
oOrder.GetByKey(Convert.ToInt32(BaseDocEntry));

// Loop through each row in the grid
for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; i++)
{

    // Get the value in a specific column and row
    docLink = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Link", i).ToString();
    isLinked = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Linked", i).ToString();

    if ( docLink == "Y" & isLinked == "N" ) {

        DocEntry = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("DocEntry", i).ToString();
        DocNum = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("DocNum", i).ToString();

        if ( FirstRow == false ) {

            oOrder.DocumentReferences.Add();

        }

        application.StatusBar.SetText("Linking Row " + (i+1) + ": " + DocNum, BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Warning);

        oOrder.DocumentReferences.ReferencedObjectType = SAPbobsCOM.ReferencedObjectTypeEnum.rot_SalesOrder; 
        oOrder.DocumentReferences.ReferencedDocEntry = Convert.ToInt32(DocEntry);
        oOrder.DocumentReferences.Remark = "Shipping Link";

        FirstRow = false;

    }

}

nResult = oOrder.Update(); // returns error number during operation 0 is no error

if (nResult != 0)  {
    company.GetLastError(out nResult, out cMessErr);
    throw new Exception(cMessErr);
}

form.Items.Item("BOY_6").Click(); // Click Refresh button

application.StatusBar.SetText("Documents finished linking. (UF-024)", BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);

As @Johan_H mentioned, an issue perhaps how you are doing it is the object already has a single line when you create it.  SO, if you declare the object, then define your properties and you add a row you technically do not need to do this, it will cause issues.  Not errors but it will usually just not work.  So you can see I start the code off with a "FirstRow" variable as "True" so I can avoid doing the add if it's the first row.  I had the same issue with my code, it would do every row except the first one properly until I did this.  I experimented, broke down the grid loop and then figured out that I didn't need to do the Add() off the first row.  Because there is already a row...

The second thing is that you should be wary of the TRY / CATCH stuff off the bat.  I use it but in your case you know your process is roughly correct.  You want to use the method I'm using for a better result (don't forget to define the variables):

nResult = oOrder.Update(); // returns error number during operation 0 is no error

if (nResult != 0)  {
    company.GetLastError(out nResult, out cMessErr);
    throw new Exception(cMessErr);
}

This gives you a clearer indication of what's wrong from my experience.

What I normally do to troubleshoot these type of builds is I just write out the steps I'm going to use manually without the loop.  So I would go like define the object, then pull the first row data into the properties then I would add then I would pull the second row into a new object and add, etc.  This way I know that I have a basic two / three row working step by step.  Then I work back to using the for() statements to recreate the same shape of the steps I need to do.  This is what got me working with the FirstRow Boolean process.  When I did the rows manually it didn't work, I was doing the add and it was just not doing it.  When I got rid of the add in my steps for the first row then it clicked into place and when I added the for() steps with the FirstRow it totally worked.

You can also break down each step and add MessageBox UI elements and StatusBar stuff too so you can see at each step if the data is going in the right place.

I plan on doing some videos on the B1UP Dynamic Syntax UF stuff.  I have a lot of examples now that I can share.

I hope this can help you, give it a try and if you are still stuck try and post your SQL Report code too, then I can have the full example to help troubleshoot.

Good luck!

Mike

entry.title: scheduling agreement - Output issue
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I need your support to understand and solve an issue related to Scheduling agreement, suddenly, the SA release copy was received by another user. However, no one updated the order from the planning side, yet the order was still received.

SA release copy email should be received by user who creates/modifies it.

Could you please guide how to solve this issue?

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Can someone explain the differences between Match type?
entry.content: Hi, please check step 5.b on help page: Define Matching Methods.

entry.title: Is there any data source related to outbound delivery request details in ByD system?
entry.content:
In Business ByDesign, is there any standard data source related to outbound delivery request details?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there any data source related to outbound delivery...
entry.content:
Currently there is no standard data source related to outbound delivery request.

We recommend you to post your query in SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 so that our development can look into it. Please note you may search it firstly and if it is not found, please register your requirement for this new feature.

Other customers can then vote for it, which will assert its legitimacy as a standard feature by showing the industry need and in turn influence the implementation schedule of the requirement.

Alternatively, you can try to create custom data source to fulfill your requirement.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One , Android Mobile application is not...

Hi nikunjmehta2290

For connection failed error, please check section 7 of SAP note 1924930.
Also verify the connection between the mobile device and the B1i server. See SAP Note 1776825 for instructions.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Install ERP component on PPM system

Hi 

Kindly refer to the SAP Note 2395243 along with the attachment PDF with the version supported on your ERP system.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Employee history Importing custom field issue
entry.content: Hi Ritanshi, Generally, History processor will fetch custom field data without any issues. Problem might come when you use picklist values where you need to map with picklist for the History field to display the name. Is it possible to check the issue through screen share?

entry.title: How to transfer data from HANADB to snowflake using Data Intellegence?
entry.content:
Hi!

I want to transfer data from s4hanadb(for example ACDOCA table) to snowflake using data intellegence, and i've successfully get data from hana db using read hana table operator.

But i don't know how to transfer the data to snowflake. I tried to use the cloud table producer,but i got nothing at mapping field. 

Really prefer to get some help on how to do this without using the cds view.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not working
entry.content: I can't spot anything wrong from the information you shared. Maybe double check the connection in SAC that it is pointing to the correct HDI container and using a valid RT user?

Best Regards,

Hira

entry.title: Re: clipboard error while excel data uploading in sap
entry.content:
Hi,

I've figured out an alternate solution to disable/avoid clipboard alert, please follow the below-mentioned steps:  

 

ActiveClipboard (ACB): An Office feature that allows for storing of previous copies to paste later different prior copies. This feature is generally only available if Clipboard task pane is displayed to a user. You can disable the feature that causes the most issues by disabling automatic collection.

Disable Auto Collection using the registry:

HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Common\General\
(REG_DWORD): AcbControl
VALUE: (enter as hexadecimal) 80000000

Note: Before setting AcbControl, all Office applications (including Outlook etc.) must be closed, no running instances in the task manager. Otherwise, when those apps close, they will write the key back to what it was when those apps launched.

-Adarsh Chougale

entry.title: Re: Could you please let me know the asset accounting Acq...
entry.content: Please help me with detailed

entry.title: Re: API call to connect DMS with SharePoint
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The first part of the development I have achieved, so elaborating here

We need to create a custom entry in SM30 for table SGOSATTR

Once done the custom entry would start appearing in application toolbar

Please Note: We need to create a Z class by Inheriting standard class CL_GOS_SERVICE and redefine execute and check status method.

Now for second part which is to attach document to SAP from SharePoint and vice versa I am exploring, if someone has any reference how this part can be achieved kindly reply

entry.title: Re: Connecting to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant to SAP Da...
entry.content:
Hi Rebeca, can you please cross check the SAC UUID you are entering? Error seems to denote that might be an issue. As for data centers, in EU itself (assuming its continent you are referring to), there are multiple data centers depending on hyperscaler and each one of them would be counted as different. 

Another thing I want to highlight is that when it will authenticate, it will open up a new window where it will ask for credentials. Its not automatically the user who is logged into Datasphere rather the one you enter credentials for when you open the link in the private window. Here is a blog and video on all the steps: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/user-context-for-metadata-extraction-to-sap-datasphere-catalog/ba-p/13571886

If issue still persists, please open an incident. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Career Prospect for NonSAP Integration Developer In SAP
entry.content:
There are good career prospects for Non-SAP Integration Developers in SAP. These specialists are in demand as companies increasingly integrate SAP with various external systems.

Here's a quick breakdown:

Demand: Companies need Non-SAP integration to connect SAP with external applications.
Skills: Focus on non-SAP technologies and integration tools like SAP BTP Integration Suite. Basic understanding of ABAP can be helpful.

entry.title: BP Transaction : Collection contact person is not getting created
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating contact person in BP transaction through BAPI with the below parameters.

 call function 'BAPI_BUPR_CONTP_CREATE'
      exporting
        businesspartner     = lv_kunnr
        contactperson       = rv_partner
        defaultrelationship = ' '
      tables
        addressduplicates   = lt_addressduplicates
        return              = lt_bapiret2_tab.

 

It's creating the contact person successfully which I can see under "Has contact person tab"(Please refer the attached screenshot)

But When I checked "Has collection contact person" I can see there is no entry there as expectation is to create collection contact person details as well.

I have already tried with the above BAPI with some additional parameters but no success yet.

I also tried with a new BAPI with the below parameters but even after success message. Collection contact person is not getting created.

data : lt_result            type table of bapiret2.
  call function 'BUPR_RELATIONSHIP_CREATE'
    exporting
      iv_partner_1    = lv_kunnr
      iv_partner_2    = rv_partner
      iv_relationship = 'UDM001'
      iv_x_save       = space
    tables
      et_return       = lt_result.
*  endif..

Please let me know if you have come through this scenario or have any information about this topic.

 

Regards,

Om

entry.title: Re: SAC Story: How to derive a dimension value from the p...
entry.content:
Hi SP9 , 

   I think it's not easy to achieve only with story. I would propose below: 

  1. User input data in a table booking all data to a dummy account.
  2. Instead of standard publish button(you can hide it via customized toolbar) , you create a button to trigger data publish via API.
  3. Before you call the publish API, you trigger a data action which will book data to the target account based on the material property.

Best regards, William 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Working with Object Tables in SAP Mobile Development Kit
entry.content:
Hi All!
I am having trouble understanding, and gaining access to the values within object tables. My current project uses a 'checklist' which uses the object table as its main component, and each 'item' in the checklist has a boolean field in its ODATA called 'isMandatory'.
Ultimately, I need to be able to submit this checklist using a submit button at the bottom of the page, ONLY IF all items that are Mandatory have been populated. I just have no idea how to access those values...

I have attached a text file with the page structure taken. Currently, the 'isMandatory' value is being held in the statusText field.

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to create custom button in VA01 screen header payment tab?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,


How can we create a custom button in the payment header tab of the VA01 screen without using an implicit enhancement?

Are there any BAdIs that can be used to modify the screen?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One. Can I determine Last Evaluated Price?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

To accurately reflect the situation in our warehouse, we use two codes for certain materials: (1) "pcs" for individual pieces and (2) "Box" for boxes of materials. This helps us track how many boxes and individual pieces of a material we have in stock.

For example, we have item code A001 for a screw and another item code B001 for a box of screws, where each box contains 1000 screws. The Bill of Materials (BOM) for B001 is 1000 units of A001. Since A001 costs $0.2 per screw, the cost of B001 is $200 ($0.2 x 1000).

When we run out of individual screws, we execute a disassembly production order to "unpack" a box of screws. This means we disassemble 1 unit of B001 to obtain 1000 units of A001 in SAP, allowing workers to access 1000 individual screws from our warehouse.

However, a problem arises when we use the moving average method to evaluate stock. When we disassemble a B001, the increased count of 1000 A001 units does not always equal $200 in total value. We understand that this discrepancy may be due to errors in the past or rounding issues, but it consistently results in residuals in the Work in Progress (WIP) account. We attempted to clear out old stock in SAP before introducing new stock, but the system continues to produce inaccurate values.

Is there any way for me to determine the value when executing a disassembly production order, or any method to ensure that the value of A001 equals one-thousandth of B001's value?

Thank you very much!

Francis

entry.title: Re: Journal entries not listed on incoming payment create...
entry.content: SAP Business one v10 FP2202 also tested with v10 FP2402 and the results are the same.

entry.title: basic start date in planned order not correct
entry.content:
hi everyone we have ran into an issue.

a purchased material lead time is 90 days 

a PIRs is attached with requiremnet date 20240725, when MRP run, a planned order is generated, but the Basic order start date is not correct, it is in a same day with order end date. 

please give some guidance, many thanks!

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: Re: Financial Management Series Blog #1: Series Kick-Off
entry.content: great!

entry.title: Re: Depreciation after end of planned life
entry.content:
Hi All, We are using S/4 HANA 2021 versions on premise and the requirement is to create a WDV/ Diminishing Balance Method depreciation key for India COD. I have created a new depreciation key with 4 parameters BASE method opt as a 'stated percentage', Declining method choose as 001, Period control as 003 and Multilevel method ('Base value- 024 & 20%)'. Now for testing purpose when I'm posting an acquisition value of 12,000 with 5 years useful life and salvage value - 0 to the asset it is calculating correctly as per the depreciation factor - 20% year on WDV method i.e. FY- 2024 ord. dep. - 2,400 and FY-2025 - 1,920 and FY-2026 - 1,536 and FY-2027 - 1,229 and FY-2028 - 4,915. However it is not nullified in FY- 2028 system again calculating 20% of 4,915 i.e. (983.04 - ord. dep.) and post which it is stopped with NBV- 3,932.16 but technically it should close the depreciation after the end of useful life i.e. so in FY- 2028 ord. dep. amount would be 4,915 can we achieve this through standard SAP functionality because in SLM system behaves accordingly. As a reference you can check in google depreciation calculator - https://www.calculator.net/depreciation-calculator.html?cmethod=declining&ccost=12%2C000&csalvage=0&cyears=5&cfactor=1&cround=yes&cpartical=no&cparticalmethod=halfmonth&startday=2024-05-07&caymonth=1&cayday=1&printit=0&x=Calculate Please advise?

Note:  I have done couple of changes in configuration in order to get the same but not able to get it. I have change the BASE method of dep key by selecting 'dep after planned life end' to yes also in multilevel method check the check box 'percentage from remaining life' but couldn't able to succeeded.

Best Regards,

Gourav Bose

entry.title: Re: 欢迎！
Re: Billing document is missing(VBRK,VBRP), but have acco...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. I have cheked already that the billing doc is not archived. According Note 1579523, I have checked missing billing documents but now how can I reverse that useless accounting document? It doesn't have billing doc so can not reverse in VF11

entry.title: SAP WDV/ Diminishing Value Method - 'Ordinary depreciation after the end of useful-Life'
entry.content:
Hi All, We are using S/4 HANA 2021 versions on premise and the requirement is to create a WDV/ Diminishing Balance Method depreciation key for India COD.

I have created a new depreciation key with 4 parameters BASE method opt as a 'stated percentage', Declining method choose as 001, Period control as 003 and Multilevel method ('Base value- 024 & 20%)'. Now for testing purpose when I'm posting an acquisition value of 12,000 with 5 years useful life and salvage value - 0 to the asset it is calculating correctly as per the depreciation factor - 20% year on WDV method i.e. FY- 2024 ord. dep. - 2,400 and FY-2025 - 1,920 and FY-2026 - 1,536 and FY-2027 - 1,229 and FY-2028 - 4,915. However it is not nullified in FY- 2028 system again calculating 20% of 4,915 i.e. (983.04 - ord. dep.) and post which it is stopped with NBV- 3,932.16 but technically it should close the depreciation after the end of useful life i.e. so in FY- 2028 ord. dep. amount would be 4,915 can we achieve this through standard SAP functionality because in SLM system behaves accordingly. As a reference you can check in google depreciation calculator - https://www.calculator.net/depreciation-calculator.html?cmethod=declining&ccost=12%2C000&csalvage=0&cyears=5&cfactor=1&cround=yes&cpartical=no&cparticalmethod=halfmonth&startday=2024-05-07&caymonth=1&cayday=1&printit=0&x=Calculate     Please advise?

Note:  I have done couple of changes in configuration in order to get the same but not able to get it. I have change the BASE method of depreciation key by selecting 'dep. after planned life end' to yes also in multilevel method check the check box 'percentage from remaining life' but couldn't able to succeeded.

Best Regards,

Gourav Bose

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculation view Union giving more records than...
entry.content: Use a aggregation node on that union node without aggregating any measures it will remove all the duplicates.

entry.title: Reading of OData metadata/field labels in UI5
entry.content:
Hello, I am currently exploring UI5 and I'm trying to read the labels from the OData metadata of an RAP Service in a Fiori freestyle application. Currently I have a two page setup that serves as a List Report & Creation (Object) Page. The reason I am using a freestyle application is that the creation/object page has to have a lot of custom ui5 features. 

In the List Report page I am using a Smart Table + a Smart Filter to work with the entity, but in the creation (object) page I am using non-smart controls. For the non smart controls, I would like to access the labels directly from the OData metadata. 

I would accomplish that by doing so:

        <Label text="{/#Entity/Property/@sap:label}" labelFor="someField" />

In the case where I start from the List Report ( e.g. open the app, use the creation button to navigate to the object/creation page ) this label is loaded. This is not the case if I load the object (creation) page directly ( e.g. by navigating to the object/creation page with the URL ), then I get the error that the Entity is not a valid EntityType.

I would assume the following: Since the smart controls preload the data from the Entity I want to use, then in the object page, these labels are already present from being loaded from the List Report, but since I do not use Smart Controls on the object/creation page, I should handle the data load from the entity.

What I've also checked is that the metadata on the object page is loaded correctly, it's just that the annotations for the entity are not present for a reason unknown to me.

I would ask, what is the correct way to handle this, in cases where I have to create an new object and I do not have anything to load?

Maybe that's the not correct approach, so what I would like to do is just access the labels, but not preload any data in the page.

entry.title: SAC Planning Advanced Formula - Rolling 3 Months Summation
entry.content:
Hi All - I am wanting to create a data action that will calculate the rolling 3 months summation value.

In other words, a user will enter a date/month range, and then for each month of that range, a rolling 3 months value must be calculated (as per pic below).

I have successfully created formula measures (using the SMA function) and added to a story, but I am now needing to calculate and store the value in the model.  And unfortunately formula measures can't be referenced in the advanced formula.

I have tried using the FOREACH and PREVIOUS functions but am not getting the result right.

Can someone please assist with the required code?

Rgds

Anton

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 - Release highlights of SuccessFactors Performance and Goals
entry.content:
Hi @rerams 

We just have 2 permissions for this.

1- To enable it you need to assign Objective Management Feature Settings permission under admin permission

2- To access it by user you need to enable Access Objective Alignment Chart permission under user permissions.

entry.title: Union giving duplicate values
entry.content:
I am facing an issue with HANA calculation view "UNION" Node. I have a HANA calculation view with 2 joins say, Join_1 and Join_2 . In data preview, I see both giving 6 records each . In next step i have a Union , say Union_1 which takes Join_1 and Join_2 as input. Now when I do data preview on the Union node, I get 16 records , 4 records extra. I was expecting 6+6 =12 records. The additional 4 records are actually duplicates . I need to know the reason which records are getting duplicate and why? 

I have checked the data in join 1 and 2 there is no dupliucates available there

entry.title: Re: Unveiling SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Analysis Insights for Optimal Performance
entry.content: Very informative blog 😁

entry.title: Re: RFC user and permissions
entry.content:
Hello @ando1692 ,

Actually, you can use all types of user for RFC communication. But the best practice is to use System User then you won't need to care about password lifetime, dialog accesss...

For the required roles, I'd say it depends on case by case and there is no one method for one.

You can try to find out that information by creating a new system user without any assigned roles. After that, enable the authorization tracing on the called system with STAUTHTRACE and doing some required activites from the calling system.

At the end, you can evaluate the authorization errors on the called system with the above TCode and develop a new role which is sufficient with your requirement.

entry.title: LSMW Create Routing & Component Allocation with Direct Input
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'm using LSMW, Direct Input, Object 0170 for Creating Routing & Component Allocation.

The issue is "CM 101 No valid material component found".

I also checked the entire BOM & Routing relative informations:

- BOM status (+ Production)

- BOM valid date

- BOM status (RelWkSch)

- BOM Item status (+ Production Relevent)

But still facing with the error 😞

Is there anything else that I need to check ???

entry.title: LMS Integrated External User Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! We have a scenario where our Admins have created Learning Only users manually through "Add New" but the users dont have access to LMS. We dont have LMS site either.

The purpose of creation was to record only the completions and internal training records. They dont need to access LMS at all. Will their account get removed in the system after 2H2024 on Nov 2024? Can we still continue to use this setup after 2H2024? 

Thank you for the help!

Regards,

Wayne

entry.title: SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Wavre, Belgium)
entry.content:
This is the all-new SAP CodeJam event for SAP Build (reworked in February 2024) and will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP (ES5), S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday, June 27th, 2024 from 09:00 - 14:00 hours local time in Wavre, Belgium. The language of the event and the content will be English.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location 

Event Address: Av. Fleming 14, 1300 Wavre, Belgium

.The instructor is SAP Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga.

The event is kindly being hosted by delaware – thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 25 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section above to the right.

MDK version 24.4
Screenshots:

@Jitendra_Kansal: Could you support? I didn't find similar post in community.

Thank you for any support!

entry.title: Opening Fiori Launchpad with Transaction Code /UI2/FLP via Hosts File Modification
entry.content:
When working with SAP Fiori, it’s often necessary to customize your system for smoother operations and better integration. One common customization is opening the Fiori Launchpad using a specific transaction code, `/UI2/FLP`, by modifying the `hosts` file on a Mac. This manual mapping of DNS names to IP addresses is especially useful in development environments or when needing to resolve addresses without querying external DNS servers.

Modifying the `/etc/hosts` File on a Mac

The `hosts` file on MacOS allows you to override the DNS resolution process by manually specifying which IP addresses should be associated with particular domain names. Here’s how you can edit this file to facilitate access to Fiori Launchpad via the transaction code `/UI2/FLP`.

Step 1: Open Terminal

First, access the Terminal application on your Mac. You can find it within your Applications folder or quickly search for it using Spotlight.

Step 2: Edit the Hosts File

Use a command-line text editor like nano to open and edit the `/etc/hosts` file. This requires administrative privileges, so you will need to prepend `sudo` to the command:

sudo nano /etc/hosts

Step 3: Add Your Entry

In the `hosts` file, each line should start with an IP address followed by a space or tab, and then the domain name(s) you want to map to this IP. For instance, if you are setting up a local development environment for Fiori and want to map `local.fiori.com` to your localhost, add the following line:

127.0.0.1 local.fiori.com

 

Step 4: Save Changes and Exit

After adding your desired entries, save the file by pressing `Control+O` and then `Enter` to confirm. Exit the editor with `Control+X`.

Step 5: Flush DNS Cache

To ensure that your changes take effect immediately, you may need to flush the DNS cache on your Mac. This can be done by restarting the mDNSResponder service with the following command:

sudo killall -HUP mDNSResponder

By following these steps, you will have configured your Mac to direct Fiori-related domain requests to the specified IP address, bypassing the need for DNS queries. This method is particularly useful for testing and development purposes where rapid access to SAP Fiori environments is required without modifying DNS settings on a broader network.

entry.title: Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures in freeze
entry.content:
Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures when we use freeze in table column. This option is available in Lumira Dashboards but couldn't find in SAC table.

Attached the screenshot of Lumira dashboard table for reference (Two scrollbars are marked).

Any help in this topic is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@Ethan_Dai So is the Teams app working then? The failure for the admin does not mean a failure for the end user. Perhaps some users are already mapped based on your configuration. It is only the admin who is doing the connection that is failing.

The problem is whether the SF Admin and the Teams Admin is the same person, i.e the person who is logged in to SF doing the user mapping connection, needs to have a corresponding user on the Azure side.

entry.title: Re: CDS view Required - S4Hana Public Cloud MD04 - stock...
entry.content:
Hi Laurens,

There is no CDS view available yet for this.
You may use this API alternatively . 
https://hub.sap.com/api/API_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01/resource/Supply_and_Demand
See also the online help.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/40ca14cc187949798862ee566868d2ab.html

Best regards
Corey

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 13
entry.content:
Links to the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • (Capire) April Release https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/apr24 
  • CAP Node.js - Good To Know! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDZ18v94otZSJJrpcNkPPV9 
  • Controlling automatic HTTP requests in CAP Node.js design time loops https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/05/03/controlling-automatic-http-requests-in-cap-node.js-design-time-loops/ 
  • Arrow function expressions https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Functions/Arrow_functions (see this part specifically: "The braces can only be omitted if the function directly returns an expression. If the body has additional lines of processing, the braces are required — and so is the return keyword. Arrow functions cannot guess what or when you want to return")
  • Using an underscore as a JS function parameter: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/27637013/what-is-the-meaning-of-an-underscore-in-javascript-function-parameter

entry.title: Re: How to open the MM closed period, when Material Ledge...
entry.content:
Hello @Qaisar_9009 

See the note 2042164 - MMPV Period shifted by error to future period for Material Ledger active plant

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to keep PDF file created by output control?
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I would like to know how to keep PDF form that be created by output control, e.g. purchase order form.

In my understanding, there is a feature in ECC. I want to use this function in S/4HANA public cloud.

With my experience of ECC, we can select "Print and Archive" in the output control settings. With this setting, we can see the form later which was printed past day. (Reprint function uses as-is data. I want to see the original form with data at printing.)

Can you give me advice to achive this requirement?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Welcome to all our new group members @nitishkumarrao @Nivedha_T @BobinB @JuanAlonso and @HectorHerGar - looking forward to seeing your contributions in SAP Community and I'm sure you will gain lots of knowledge in return!

Be sure to take part in discussions in our interest groups, or start a discussion of your own!

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Good to hear @HectorHerGar - and also good to have you here in SAP Community. Will you write blog posts?

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Thanks for sharing @JuanAlonso and good to have you in SAP Community!

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2405 版本新 Email Settings 指南
entry.content:
新功能简介

从 SAP CPQ 2405 版本开始，系统邮件通知功能进行了安全升级。旧的 SAP CPQ SMTP 服务将在不久的将来停用，取而代之新功能提供了两个新的选项：更高安全性的新 SAP CPQ SMTP 服务，以及支持连接客户自有的 SMTP 服务。 对于每一个 SAP CPQ 客户来说，管理员都需要调整现有的系统邮件通知功能设定，以适配更高安全性、或客制化的 SMTP 服务应用需求。
该新功能同时适用 Quote 1.0 与 Quote 2.0。

 

管理员用户需要采取的行动

当您的 SAP CPQ 环境升级到 2405 版本后，管理员在 Setup->General 菜单中可以看到一个新的 "Email Settings" 配置路径。打开该配置点后，可以看到系统将 SMTP 应用集成按 CPQ 内邮件通知功能的场景进行了分组。管理员用户需要对 SMTP Type 为 “CPQ Legacy SMTP Service” 的每一种 Setting Type 调整适配。

以 Setting Type "Users" 为例，页面右侧 Affected Features 列出了该场景设定类型相关的邮件通知功能。升级后未调整配置前，系统保留既有的 SMTP 设定，设定页面顶端会提示该设定方式将在近期退役，推荐使用新的设定方式。

SAP SMTP Service (default)

若您仍想使用 SAP CPQ 提供的自带 SMTP 服务，则可选择 SMTP Type "SAP SMTP Service (default)"。选中后会发现发信地址固化为 no-reply-cpq@notifications.sap.com， 即 SAP CPQ 通用邮件通知寄件地址；其余字段则仍然支持自定义设定，例如发信人显示名等。

Custom SMTP Service

若您想要使用自有或其它平台提供的 SMTP 服务，或您想保留原自定义的寄件地址，则需要选择 SMTP Type "Custom SMTP Service"。本文以中国内地常用的 QQ 邮箱服务为例，设定如下图。

设定完成后，可以点击下方的 "Test" 按钮，若集成联通成功， 系统将弹出成功消息，并向您当前的 CPQ 用户账号邮箱发送一封测试邮件。

若集成联通失败，系统将弹出错误消息。此时，作为管理员用户，您可以打开 Developer Console，勾选 "Full Mode" 与 "Trace Script API Calls"，Error 类型的追踪日志中可以查看外部 SMTP 服务返回的错误详细内容。您可再依此调整您的设定。

entry.title: SAP iRPA Process Kept Hanging
entry.content:
Hi everyone, recently I have noticed my clients bot kept on hitting the maximum amount of time which is 2 hours to complete an automation. This bot is an unattended bot running on a physical machine which runs every 30 minutes.

When looking into the Monitoring page, I can see there's a lot of Failed (Due to exceed amount of duration) and Expired (Only waits for 1 hour).

When checking the bot physically on my client site, I can see the bot just hangs not doing anything. Does this issue happened to anyone else?

entry.title: alert mechanism for SLG1 error logs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

some of our production jobs finished with successful status, but occasionally, errors are written in the SLG1 log. If the job completes successfully, it is difficult to identify when there are errors reported in SLG1. Currently in one of our production satellite systems, a job is logging an error message in SLG1 when the Token generation failed, yet the job completes successfully.

We need to check if we can set up any kind of email alert mechanism using Solution Manager, to generate an alert based upon errors reported in SLG1?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: alert mechanism for SLG1 error logs
entry.content:
For this monitoring requirement, I would recommend reviewing the Exception Management scenario:

3346783 - How to enable SLG1 Monitoring in SAP Solution Manager
https://me.sap.com/notes/3346783

Best regards, 

Luke
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Can't see tickets
entry.content:
Hi there

We have an issue where one user is unable to see tickets or options in dropdowns when trying to create a ticket, they are also unable to see account information.

Any ideas why this could be happening?

Thanks

Rehanna

entry.title: Re: Lambda expression error in backoffice module manager...
entry.content:
Hi,

in my case (version 2211) removing all jars inside data/backoffice directory and restarting the hybris helped.

entry.title: I want it to remain on the line you are working on after the Alv refresh process.
entry.content: When we mark a checkbox on a line in Abap Alv, I want to stay on the line you are working on after the Alv refresh process.
